title: Interactive dashboard: Alzheimer's Disease in Latin America (2000-2050). 8 countries, projections, policy index, caregiver burden. DOI: 10.7910/DVN/UVHABW
description: Interactive dashboard and dataset on Alzheimer's disease prevalence, incidence projections (2000-2050), healthcare access indices, and caregiver burden across 8 Latin American countries. Includes policy impact analysis and demographic breakdowns. FAIR-compliant with multilingual documentation in 8+ languages.

creators.name: de la Serna Tuya, Juan Moisés

notes: OpenAIRE compliant. Submitted to EOSC Future. Part of the Open Research Collection by Juan Moisés Serna Tuya (DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19145316). Includes CITATION.cff, datapackage.json, and Schema.org structured metadata.
